subcodes.first_line: O ye beloved of God! For ages the horizon of Iran was darkened, and the realm of Persia was the arena of Arab conquest [3.5s]... O ye divine believers! For many centuries the horizon of Persia was dark and the country of Iran
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی قرونی بود که افق ایران تاریک بود و کشور ایران جولانگاه عرب و
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @Zoroastrianism; Mahabad and Zoroaster, @praise and encouragement
